lessons.title: Lists Basics
lessons.description: Create, access, and update list items.

questions.questionText: Which bracket type defines a list?
Fill to access first element.

questions.explanation: append adds one item to end of list.

lessons.title: While Loops
lessons.description: Use while to repeat until condition changes.

questions.questionText: Which keyword starts a while loop?
questions.explanation: while repeats while condition is true.

questions.questionText: Fill increment operator line.
What risk exists in while loops?
questions.explanation: If condition never becomes false, loop never stops.

lessons.title: Functions
lessons.description: Write reusable logic with def and return.
lessons.codeExample:

questions.explanation: return sends value back to caller.
